In a medium-small rondeaux, sweat onions in oil until soft
Add worcestershire sauce and fish sauce, reduce until sec
On low heat, add the sugar and cook down to a syrup
Cool and mix in the rest of the ingredients
Reserve to quart containers and store in the cooler.
